html:
Corn is a common Vegetable Food item that can be grown on a Farm Plot by planting Seeds or Corn Seeds (Clustered Seeds).

Corn is the main ingredient in the Crock Pot recipes for Fish Tacos and Powdercake and has a vegetable value of 1 in crock pot recipes. Feeding Corn to a bird in a Birdcage will produce 1–2 Corn Seeds, as well as a 50% chance to get Seeds. In Don't Starve Together, you will always get 1 Corn Seed.


Popcorn

Popcorn is a Vegetable Food item made by cooking Corn. It restores the same but half as much compared to its raw counterpart. It can be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes.

While Popcorn is less valuable than Corn as a food, it will last longer. Since it can still be used as Corn in recipes, Popcorn is a good way to preserve Corn.

Usage

Recipes

×2

Gallery

  • Original HD Corn icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Original HD Corn Cooked icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

Miscellaneous
"corn"
“High in fructose!”
–Wilson, when examining Corn.
“A sweet vegetable, yum!”
–Willow, when examining Corn.
“Is corn. What expect?”
–Wolfgang, when examining Corn.
“I could make a corny joke, but I'll refrain.”
–Wendy, when examining Corn.
“SAY(CORNY_JOKE)”
–WX-78, when examining Corn.
“Zea mays, a great staple food.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Corn.
“I like it, but not in everything that I eat.”
–Woodie, when examining Corn.
“High in fructose.”
–Maxwell, when examining Corn.
“A fascinating display of Voronoi patterns.”
–Wagstaff, when examining Corn.
“A vegetable swörd!”
–Wigfrid, when examining Corn.
“Corn in the raw.”
–Webber, when examining Corn.
“Aw, shucks.”
–Walani, when examining Corn.
“Corn! Sweet, sweet corn!”
–Warly, when examining Corn.
“Fresh corn! 'Tis me lucky day.”
–Woodlegs, when examining Corn.
“'TIS COBS OF YUM YUMS”
–Wilba, when examining Corn.
“Good for belly”
–Wormwood, when examining Corn.
“Aerodynamic food.”
–Wheeler, when examining Corn.
“I talked its ear off. Ha!”
–Winona, when examining Corn.
“I prefer not to ingest food.”
–Wortox, when examining Corn.
“Eat cob for extra crunchy snack, flort.”
–Wurt, when examining Corn.
“Some corn on the cob sounds pretty good right about now.”
–Walter, when examining Corn.
“The nice thing about corn is you don't have to fuss with cooking it.”
–Wanda, when examining Corn.
Corn is a common Vegetable Food item that can be grown on a Farm Plot by planting Seeds or Corn Seeds (Clustered Seeds).
Corn is the main ingredient in the Crock Pot recipes for Fish Tacos and Powdercake and has a vegetable value of 1 in crock pot recipes. Feeding Corn to a bird in a Birdcage will produce 1–2 Corn Seeds, as well as a 50% chance to get Seeds. In Don't Starve Together, you will always get 1 Corn Seed.

Miscellaneous
"corn_cooked"
“Cooked and high in fructose!”
–Wilson, when examining Popcorn.
“Ooh, this one explodes when it goes in fire!”
–Willow, when examining Popcorn.
“Pop pop pop! Ha ha, funny corn.”
–Wolfgang, when examining Popcorn.
“This corn couldn't handle the heat.”
–Wendy, when examining Popcorn.
“EMPTY CALORIES”
–WX-78, when examining Popcorn.
“Popped corn!”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Popcorn.
“Cooked with the goodness of corn.”
–Woodie, when examining Popcorn.
“A little more refined, at least.”
–Maxwell, when examining Popcorn.
“Tasty treats formed from a influx of energy.”
–Wagstaff, when examining Popcorn.
“Pöpped cörn smells gööd.”
–Wigfrid, when examining Popcorn.
“Popping corn.”
–Webber, when examining Popcorn.
“I'll need a toothpick soon.”
–Walani, when examining Popcorn.
“Could use miso and lardons...”
–Warly, when examining Popcorn.
“Roasted corn, me favorite.”
–Woodlegs, when examining Popcorn.
“FWOOSHING MAKETH IT FLUFFY!”
–Wilba, when examining Popcorn.
“Pop! Pop!”
–Wormwood, when examining Popcorn.
“Makes for a crackerjack projectile.”
–Wheeler, when examining Popcorn.
“Tell me if I get'em stuck in my teeth.”
–Winona, when examining Popcorn.
“I thought it was supposed to pop.”
–Wortox, when examining Popcorn.
“They 'sploded!”
–Wurt, when examining Popcorn.
“I don't have anything to fund-raise for out here...”
–Walter, when examining Popcorn.
“It could really use some butter.”
–Wanda, when examining Popcorn.
Popcorn is a Vegetable Food item made by cooking Corn. It restores the same but half as much compared to its raw counterpart. It can be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes.
While Popcorn is less valuable than Corn as a food, it will last longer. Since it can still be used as Corn in recipes, Popcorn is a good way to preserve Corn.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ngô là một loại Thực phẩm Rau phổ biến có thể được trồng trên Ô Trang trại bằng cách gieo Hạt giống hoặc Hạt ngô (Hạt giống theo cụm).
